lines.ja: 四角四面でいらんなくてごめん
lines.en: Sorry I'm too stiff and square, no use to anyone

lines.ja: 全能のクセして限界だ、ごめん
lines.en: Sorry — I act all-knowing and I'm already at my limit

lines.ja: 未だ来ない未来に酔い痴れてたら
lines.en: While I was busy getting drunk on a future that never came

lines.ja: アニメ化の波に飲まれました
lines.en: the wave of anime adaptations swallowed me whole

lines.ja: 中心から離れるほどに強くなる力にただ抗って
lines.en: Just pushing back against the force that grows stronger the farther you drift from the center

lines.ja: 殿堂へ登るのも実家で寝るのも全てがあなた次第で
lines.en: Climbing into the hall of fame, or napping at your parents' place — all up to you

lines.ja: 1だけ聞いたら10知るあなたに3000くらい語って
lines.en: To you who gets ten from one, I'll rattle off three thousand

lines.ja: 健康を見せるのも優雅でいるのも興味がないもんで
lines.en: I've got zero interest in looking healthy or staying graceful

lines.ja: 苦楽苦楽させるあやしのエゴ
lines.en: A shady little ego that keeps flipping me between pain and pleasure

lines.ja: 当たっては外れてあをによし
lines.en: Hit, miss, hit, miss — "oh how fair the ancient capital"

lines.ja: 倣っ給ったのね、誰かのエゴ
lines.en: So you've been imitating — someone else's ego

lines.ja: そうできないのが大君の性なんだ
lines.en: Not being able to do that — that's the nature of the sovereign

lines.ja: 救いは来ないぞ狂い損ない
lines.en: Salvation isn't coming, you half-mad failure

lines.ja: 桃源郷にそんな福祉は無い
lines.en: There's no welfare like that in paradise

lines.ja: 「ああ、こんなに上手に滑るとは思わず」
lines.en: "Ah — I never imagined I'd faceplant this gracefully"

lines.ja: と、言いたげ　無彩色
lines.en: — or so it seemed to say. Colorless.

lines.ja: 伝わるほうへ伝わればいいとか言ったがアレは違くて
lines.en: I said "it'll reach whoever it reaches" — yeah, that was wrong

lines.ja: 戦争が起きるのも何派が在るのも結構どうでもよくて
lines.en: Wars breaking out, camps forming — honestly I couldn't care less

lines.ja: 1から「あ」なり「A」なり産める可能性だけが自慢で
lines.en: All I can brag about is the odds of birthing an "a" or an "A" from a single 1

lines.ja: 台風の目とかいう「空っぽ」が僕の夢です！
lines.en: That "empty space" they call the eye of a typhoon — that's my dream!

lines.ja: なんて叫んでら
lines.en: — or so I'm out here shouting

lines.ja: ﾀﾋ死にたいあなたに共感はしないが
lines.en: I can't relate to you wanting to die, but

lines.ja: 何となく感じ入ったげるわ
lines.en: I'll vaguely nod along with you anyway

lines.ja: そんなあなたは冥土へも行けず
lines.en: Someone like you can't even make it to the afterlife

lines.ja: 飯田も数子も言うはずだわ
lines.en: Both Iida and Kazuko would probably say the same

lines.ja: ﾀﾋ死にたいあなたに共感はしないが
lines.en: I can't relate to you wanting to die, but

lines.ja: 何となく感じ入ったげるわ
lines.en: I'll vaguely nod along with you anyway

lines.ja: そんなあなたが世界を救う
lines.en: And somebody like you is going to save the world

lines.ja: 0.1縷を説いたげるわ
lines.en: I'll preach you a 0.1-thread sermon of hope

lines.ja: 素材で食ってきたあの子は今
lines.en: That girl who lived off her looks — right now

lines.ja: 尖り違った末レプリカ未満
lines.en: she leaned edgy in the wrong direction and ended up less than a replica

lines.ja: 食らい給ったのね、あたしのエゴ
lines.en: So you gobbled it up, huh — my ego

lines.ja: その蓋然を崩したいの
lines.en: I want to tear that whole probability down

lines.ja: 苦楽苦楽してるあたしは今
lines.en: I'm bouncing between highs and lows right now

lines.ja: 光の向け先を探してる
lines.en: Hunting for where to aim the light

lines.ja: 教え給ったとこ無礼ながら
lines.en: With all due disrespect to what you taught me —

lines.ja: 偉人も君子も教科書にならないわ！
lines.en: no great figure or gentleman is making it into the textbook!

lines.ja: 教科書にならないわ
lines.en: Not gonna make it in the textbook
